demo.name: Worn-Out Pistol
description: You can fire it... if you're truly desperate.
comment: There's a pirate superstition: if the pistol doesn't explode in your hands, it's a sign of good luck.

demo.name: Broken Blade
description: At least it's still sharp...
comment: Every good story begins with a hero who's lost everything and finds himself sitting by a wrecked ship.

demo.name: Sturdy Saber
description: A simple, sturdy saber with no frills.
Its blade is scored with jagged notches from countless skirmishes - and more than once it's spared its owner a mortal wound.
comment: A simple weapon for hard times.

demo.name: Sturdy Saber
description: A simple, sturdy saber with no frills.
Its blade is scored with jagged notches from countless skirmishes - and more than once it's spared its owner a mortal wound.
comment: A simple weapon for hard times.

demo.name: Executioner
description: The blade of this halberd bears the memory of every criminal executed for the glory of the Spanish Crown.
comment: Takes their head off in one swing! Well... sometimes two.

demo.name: Executioner
description: The blade of this halberd bears the memory of every criminal executed for the glory of the Spanish Crown.
comment: Takes their head off in one swing! Well... sometimes two.

demo.name: Rapier of a Thousand Cuts
description: An expensive Spanish rapier with a silver hilt.
Its thin blade deals dozens of small wounds - each one slowly draining the life from its victim and leaving them to bleed out.
comment: You ask how he died? Two ways. Gradually, then suddenly.

demo.name: Rapier of a Thousand Cuts
description: The scarlet rose on the guard of this elegant rapier blooms by magic when drops of blood fall upon it.
comment: It is said the first wielder received it in exchange for a soul.
Lies, most likely.

demo.name: Razor
description: Nassau pirates prefer swift and brutal weapons.
This saber, razor-sharp and battle-hardened, is getting their highest praise.
comment: Feints, eh? Blade to the throat - then overboard.
- Israel Hands

demo.name: Razor
description: Nassau pirates prefer swift and brutal weapons.
This saber, razor-sharp and battle-hardened, is getting their highest praise.
comment: Feints, eh? Blade to the throat - then overboard.
- Israel Hands

demo.name: Reliable Musket
description: It won't win any prizes for accuracy, but it never misfires - even in the foulest weather.
comment: Pirate wisdom says: You won't miss if you shoot at point-blank range.

demo.name: Reliable Musket
description: It won't win any prizes for accuracy, but it never misfires - even in the foulest weather.
comment: Pirate wisdom says: You won't miss if you shoot at point-blank range.

demo.name: Club
description: Sturdy and very heavy.
What else do you need from a club?
comment: An excellent way to get your point across - straight into your opponent's head.

demo.name: Rapier
description: A balanced rapier without excess.
Its guard is studded with chips... jagged notches from hundreds of parried blows.
Still, it's beautiful.
comment: When fencing becomes a language of its own.

demo.name: Saber
description: A simple saber, well-suited to hacking down foes on cramped ship decks.
comment: It doesn't sparkle, it doesn't sing, and it doesn't promise victory.
It just cuts.

demo.name: Pistol
description: What's better than one shot? Two shots!
It fires gentle, with hardly any kick.
Just make sure you reload in time.
comment: There are many like it, but this one is mine.
